svg.text: Topics, partitions, producers, consumers, concurrency, poll settings, and consumer group strategy
Global: enterprise-managed cluster · max 10 partitions/topic · RF=3 · CooperativeStickyAssignor · static group membership (group.instance.id=HOSTNAME)
One topic per upstream — isolates backpressure, allows per-upstream consumer tuning
Single topic — all upstreams merged after ingestion. Upstream routing via EventEnvelope.upstreamId
6 channels × 3 priority tiers = 18 topics. Consumer threads and poll interval vary by tier.
Channels: SMS, Email, OTP, Voice, Webhook, Push
Priority controls: thread count + poll interval per tier
Single topic for all dispatch failures. Retry service re-publishes to original dispatch topic after backoff.
Single topic. All services publish state transitions. Audit service is the sole consumer.
Per-layer DLT topics for failed messages. Consumed by audit service for tracking. Manual replay via REST API.
Total: 31 topics · 310 partitions · batch consumers everywhere · manual ack · no auto-commit · offset tracking in Kafka (not DB)
